causal_question: Did cities that adopted CompStat in 1996 experience a change in the share of total arrests that were minor (Part II) offenses from 1995 to 1997 relative to cities that had not yet adopted (1998+)?
vague_question: Did a city's adoption of CompStat around 1996 coincide with any change in the share of arrests that were for minor (Part II) offenses?
